list.name: profile
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT profile FROM register_snapshots ORDER BY profile;

list.name: instance
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT LEFT(instance_hash, 12) AS __text, instance_hash AS __value FROM register_snapshots WHERE ($__all = '${profile}' OR profile = '${profile}') ORDER BY 1;

targets.rawSql: SELECT profile AS "Model", gateway_type AS "Gateway", COUNT(*) AS "Snapshots", COUNT(DISTINCT instance_hash) AS "Installations", MIN(time) AS "First", MAX(time) AS "Last" FROM register_snapshots GROUP BY profile, gateway_type ORDER BY "Snapshots" DESC;

panels.title: Latest Snapshots
panels.description: Most recent register snapshot per installation. Click a row to inspect registers.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (instance_hash) time AS "Timestamp", LEFT(instance_hash, 12) AS "Hash", profile AS "Model", gateway_type AS "Gateway", jsonb_object_keys(registers) AS "Register Count" FROM register_snapshots WHERE ($__all = '${profile}' OR profile = '${profile}') AND ($__all = '${instance}' OR instance_hash IN (${instance:sqlstring})) ORDER BY instance_hash, time DESC;

panels.title: Register Values (Latest Snapshot)
panels.description: Expanded register key-value pairs from the most recent snapshot for the selected instance.

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS (SELECT registers, profile, instance_hash, time FROM register_snapshots WHERE ($__all = '${profile}' OR profile = '${profile}') AND ($__all = '${instance}' OR instance_hash IN (${instance:sqlstring})) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT key AS "Register", value::text AS "Value", profile AS "Model", LEFT(instance_hash, 12) AS "Hash", time AS "Snapshot Time" FROM latest, jsonb_each(registers) ORDER BY key;
